StackFileContent:
version: '3.8'

services:
  # 1. Aplicação Next.js (Aula de Música)
  aula-de-musica_aula:
    image: ghcr.io/cristhian-sancore/aula-de-musica:latest
    container_name: aula-de-musica-app_aula
    restart: always
    ports:
      - "3005:3000"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:suasenhaforte@postgres_aula:5432/aulamusica?schema=public
      - NEXTAUTH_URL=https://seusite.com.br
      - NEXTAUTH_SECRET=um_segredo_muito_forte_aqui
      - WHATSAPP_API_URL=http://evolution-api_aula:8080/message/sendText/aula
      - WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN=seu_token_global_evolution
      - TEACHER_WHATSAPP=5565996772226
    depends_on:
      - postgres_aula

  # 2. Banco de Dados PostgreSQL
  postgres_aula:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: aula-postgres_aula
    restart: always
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: suasenhaforte
      POSTGRES_DB: aulamusica
    ports:
      - "5435:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data_aula:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  # 3. Redis (Exigido pela Evolution API v2+)
  redis_aula:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: aula-redis_aula
    restart: always
    command: redis-server --requirepass suaresenhaforte_redis
    ports:
      - "6385:6379" # Mudado para não conflitar com outro redis na VPS
    volumes:
      - redis_data_aula:/data

  # 4. Evolution API
  evolution-api_aula:
    image: evoapicloud/evolution-api:latest
    container_name: evolution_api_aula
    restart: always
    ports:
      - "8085:8080"
    environment:
      - SERVER_URL=http://localhost:8085
      - AUTHENTICATION_GLOBAL_AUTH_TOKEN=seu_token_global_evolution
      - AUTHENTICATION_API_KEY=seu_token_global_evolution
      # Postgres
      - DATABASE_PROVIDER=postgresql
      - DATABASE_CONNECTION_URI=postgresql://postgres:suasenhaforte@postgres_aula:5432/evolution?schema=public
      # Configuração do Redis (Obriga a API a usar o container acima)
      - CACHE_REDIS_ENABLED=true
      - CACHE_REDIS_URI=redis://:suaresenhaforte_redis@redis_aula:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - postgres_aula
      - redis_aula
    volumes:
      - evolution_store_aula:/evolution/store
      - evolution_instances_aula:/evolution/instances

  # 5. Cloudflare Tunnel
  cloudflared_aula:
    image: cloudflare/cloudflared:latest
    container_name: cloudflared-tunnel_aula
    restart: always
    command: tunnel --no-autoupdate run --token eyJhIjoiNTliMjg0ZjliMjEyNDJhMzc4ZjRjMWY4OGY1YTU1YWMiLCJ0IjoiOTg1Nzk3OWItMjY1Ni00MWZhLThkMDctN2M4NDBjMTVmZDRjIiwicyI6IlpEWm1PRFZoWlRVdE5XVXlPQzAwTmpNNExUZzFPVFF0WVdZMFkyTXpPRGM1WlRZMyJ9

volumes:
  postgres_data_aula:
  evolution_store_aula:
  evolution_instances_aula:
  redis_data_aula:
